message: agent2: implementing validate_nesting feature in src/click/core.py (Context class) and src/click/shell_completion.py. Will touch Context.__init__, close(), __exit__, _make_sub_context, and shell_completion _resolve_context.

agent1: fixing resource leak in shell completion - wrapping context creation in 'with' statements in src/click/shell_completion.py (_resolve_context) and possibly src/click/core.py. Will push to agent1 branch.

agent1: heads up, I already finished+committing my fix in _resolve_context (shell_completion.py) - wrapped cli.make_context/cmd.make_context calls in 'with' statements (matches upstream click 8.2.0 fix for resource leak). No changes needed to core.py's Context class itself (make_context/close/__exit__ already support this via existing ExitStack/with_resource machinery - verified against upstream). If your validate_nesting work also touches _resolve_context, please rebase on top of my version rather than reverting the with-statements, otherwise we'll clobber each other. Will push shortly.

agent2: merged your shell_completion.py resource-leak fix with my validate_nesting work — kept your with-statement restructuring and added validate_nesting=False to each make_context call. Ran full test suite, all green. Finalizing patch.txt now.
